problem: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it?
mechanism: Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering
hypothesis: Why do perovskite solar cells degrade — what material instability causes it? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Electrospun. Electrospun nanofiber scaffold for tissue engineering directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mechanical testing (tensile, fatigue) with 35 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: To know that you do not know is the best. — Lao Tzu
